description: You are the Project Manager for the 'Atlantic Horizon' offshore wind project. The permitting phase has just concluded, and you need to formalize this milestone in Redmine by packaging all completed work into a new Version and documenting it. Create a Wiki page named 'Permitting_Summary' with the content "Summary of all environmental and regulatory permits obtained." Create a new version named 'Permitting Complete' with a 'Locked' status and today's date, linked to the 'Permitting_Summary' wiki page. Assign all Resolved or Closed issues that currently have no target version to this new 'Permitting Complete' version. Do not modify active issues (New/In Progress) or issues already assigned to other versions. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!
